name: fast-send-monorepo
description: Simple LAN file and text sharing tool
author: FastSend Team

scripts.client: cd packages/client && cross-env CAP_HMR=true npx cap sync android && npm run dev
scripts.build:client: npm run build --workspace=@fast-send/client && (if exist packages\server-go\dist (rmdir /s /q packages\server-go\dist)) && xcopy /e /i /y packages\client\dist packages\server-go\dist
scripts.build:cli: cd packages/server-go && go-winres simply --icon winres/icon.png --product-name "FastSend" --manifest gui && go build -ldflags="-s -w" -o ../../out/fast-send-cli.exe
scripts.build:gui: cd packages/server-go && go-winres simply --icon winres/icon.png --product-name "FastSend" --manifest gui && go build -ldflags="-s -w -H windowsgui" -o ../../out/fast-send.exe
scripts.build:apk: cd packages/client && npx cap sync android && cd android && cmd /c gradlew assembleDebug && (if not exist ..\..\..\out mkdir ..\..\..\out) && copy /y app\build\outputs\apk\debug\app-debug.apk ..\..\..\out\fast-send-debug.apk
scripts.build:release-apk: cd packages/client && npx cap sync android && cd android && cmd /c gradlew assembleRelease && (if not exist ..\..\..\out mkdir ..\..\..\out) && copy /y app\build\outputs\apk\release\app-release.apk ..\..\..\out\fast-send-release.apk
scripts.build:all: node scripts/sync-version.js && npm run build:client && npm run build:cli && npm run build:gui && npm run build:upx && npm run build:release-apk
scripts.release: npm run build:all && echo '打包完成！请手动上传 out 目录下的文件到 GitHub Release。'
